description: Returns the next bus in ordered sequence. One of the routines INIBUS_2 or ININAM_2 must be called first. The sequence can also be affected by STAREA, STZONE, and STBSKV (more than one may be used; conditions are applied in an ‘AND’ fashion). This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr, ibus, isect, cval = nxtbus_2()

return_values.name: isect
return_values.description: Bus section number (returned as 0 for a bus represented by a single bus section). (output).

error_codes.description: ‘INIBUS_2’ or ‘ININAM_2’ was not called; ‘IBUS’, ‘ISECT’ and ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
‘CVAL’ not long enough to contain entire extended bus name; ‘IBUS’, ‘ISECT’ and ‘CVAL’ returned but ‘CVAL’ does not contain any part of the base voltage portion of extended bus name.
